zh.Tønsberg, Vestfold, Norway: 挪威維斯特福爾德奧斯格
zh.lifeSummary: 當King Håkon V Magnusson於1270年4月10日出生在挪威維斯特福爾德奧斯格時，他的父親Magnus VI of Norway31歲，母親Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark27歲。他和Gro Sigurdsdatter至少有1個女兒。他去世於1319年5月8日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在挪威奧斯陸。

zh-hans.Tønsberg, Vestfold, Norway: 挪威維斯特福爾德奧斯格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Håkon V Magnusson于1270年4月10日出生在挪威維斯特福爾德奧斯格时，他的父亲Magnus VI of Norway31岁，母亲Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark27岁。他和Gro Sigurdsdatter至少有1个女儿。他去世于1319年5月8日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在挪威奧斯陸。

nameMeanings.name: Magnusson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Niels, Anders, Erland, Gisli, Kerstin, Lars, Nils, Ottar, Thor.  German Hans, Kurt, Fritz.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name   Magnus  .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, or North German   Magnussen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Magnus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Bernd, Egon, Erwin, Kurt, Otto, Reinhard, Volker, Wilhelm, Wolfgang.

German, Flemish, and Walloon: from the personal name Magnus, which is from the Latin adjective magnus ‘great’ or a Latinized form of a short form of ancient Germanic compound names based on the element magan ‘strength, might’. The name was borne by several early Christian saints, including St. Magnus (8th century), a monk in St. Gallen in Switzerland and missionary in Allgäu in southern Germany, whose real name was Magnoald. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). In Belgium, it may also be a Latinized (humanistic) form of Walloon Legrand .

English, Scottish, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, and North German: from the Scandinavian personal name Magnus, borne by Magnus the Good (died 1047), king of Norway and Denmark, who was named for the Emperor Charlemagne, Latin Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’, under the impression that Magnus was a personal name. The name spread from Norway to the eastern Scandinavian royal houses, and became popular all over Scandinavia and thence in the English Danelaw. It has also been adopted as a Jewish name.

variants.name: Magnuson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels, Helmer, Sven, Kerstin, Alf, Anders, Hilma, Knut, Monrad, Thor.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Magnusson  .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Magnussen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Manson
meanings: Scottish (mainly the Northern Isles): shortened form of   Magnusson  .

English: patronymic, probably sometimes from the Middle English personal name Man, Manne (Old English Mann(a) or Old Danish Manni) + -son; compare Mann . Occasionally perhaps from a Middle English personal name Mainstan (Old English Mægenstān, from mægen ‘might, power’ + stān ‘stone’).
Americanized form of Swedish Månsson (rarely Månson): patronymic from the personal name Måns, a derivative of Magnus . Compare Monson .

nameMeanings.name: Håkon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Old Norse personal name Hákon, from hā ‘horse’ or ‘high’ + konr ‘son, descendant’; borne by Haakon VII of Norway ( 1872–1957 ), and by Crown Prince Haakon Magnus ( b. 1973 ).

variants.name: Hagen
meanings: 1 Germanic: short form of various compound names formed with hag ‘stockade, enclosure’.

variants.name: Hakon
meanings: from the Old Norse personal name Hákon, from hā ‘horse’ or ‘high’ + konr ‘son, descendant’; borne by Haakon VII of Norway ( 1872–1957 ), and by Crown Prince Haakon Magnus ( b. 1973 ).

variants.name: Håkan
meanings: from the Old Norse personal name Hákon, from hā ‘horse’ or ‘high’ + konr ‘son, descendant’; borne by Haakon VII of Norway ( 1872–1957 ), and by Crown Prince Haakon Magnus ( b. 1973 ).

en.lifeSummary: When King Håkon V Magnusson was born on 10 April 1270, in Tønsberg, Vestfold, Norway, his father, Magnus VI of Norway, was 31 and his mother, Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark, was 27. He had at least 1 daughter with Gro Sigurdsdatter. He died on 8 May 1319, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Oslo, Norway.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Håkon V Magnusson est né le 10 avril 1270, à Tønsberg, Vestfold, Norvège, son père, Magnus VI of Norway, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Gro Sigurdsdatter. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1319, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Oslo, Norvège.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Håkon V Magnusson am 10. April 1270 in Tønsberg, Vestfold, Norwegen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Magnus VI of Norway 31 und seine Mutter Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark 27. Er hatte mit Gro Sigurdsdatter mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Mai 1319 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Oslo, Norwegen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Håkon V Magnusson è nato il il 10 aprile 1270 nel Tønsberg, Vestfold, Norvegia, il suo padre, Magnus VI of Norway, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Gro Sigurdsdatter. Morì il 8 maggio 1319, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Oslo, Norvegia.

ja.Bergen, Norway: ノルウェーバージェン
ja.Tønsberg, Vestfold, Norway: ノルウェーベストフォルドトoンスバーグ
ja.lifeSummary: King Håkon V Magnussonが1270年4月10日にノルウェーベストフォルドトoンスバーグで生まれた時，父Magnus VI of Norwayは31歳，母Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmarkは27歳であった。彼はGro Sigurdsdatterとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1319年5月8日に故郷で49歳で死去し，ノルウェーオスロにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King Håkon V Magnusson(이)가 1270년 4월 10일 노르웨이 베스트폴드 트o스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Magnus VI of Norway(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Gro Sigurdsdatter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1319년 5월 8일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 노르웨이 오슬로에 묻혔다.

mn.10 April 1270–8 May 1319: 1270 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 10–1319 оны Тавдугаар сарын 8

pt.10 April 1270–8 May 1319: 10 de abril de 1270–8 de maio de 1319
pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Håkon V Magnusson nasceu em 10 de abril de 1270, em Tønsberg, Vestfold, Noruega, seu pai, Magnus VI of Norway, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Gro Sigurdsdatter. Ele faleceu em 8 de maio de 1319, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Oslo, Noruega.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Håkon V Magnusson родился 10 апреля 1270 г. в местности тoнсбирг, вестфолд, Норвегия, его отцу по имени Magnus VI of Norway было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark, 27. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Gro Sigurdsdatter. Он умер 8 мая 1319 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности ослоу, Норвегия.

es.10 April 1270–8 May 1319: 10 de abril de 1270–8 de mayo de 1319
es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Håkon V Magnusson nació el 10 de abril de 1270, en Tønsberg, Vestfold, Noruega, su papá, Magnus VI of Norway, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Gro Sigurdsdatter. Murió el 8 de mayo de 1319, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Oslo, Noruega.
